arts.ttl: Barcelona try to HIJACK Real Madrid transfer move
arts.sum: Barcelona are attempting to hijack Real Madrid ’s plans to sign Diogo Dalot from Manchester United . Real Madrid and Barcelona have been told it will take a bid of at least €50 million for Man Utd to consider a sale in 2025.

arts.ttl: Ex-Real Madrid star makes X-rated joke about Cristiano Ronaldo and calls out 'selfish' star
arts.sum: Rafael van der Vaart was teammates with Cristiano Ronaldo at Real Madrid and has a unique way of describing how hard the former Manchester United star worked to maintain his high standards

arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao vs Real Madrid 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Athletic Bilbao for an intense away game, quite possibly one of the toughest matches left in the team’s LaLiga schedule. Athletic are a very physical team, so Real Madrid will have to respond by matching that level of physicality while also playing with composure in this one.

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Real Madrid 'abandon' Alexander-Arnold transfer
arts.sum: Real Madrid will ‘abandon’ their hopes of signing Liverpool right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold, according to reports. Real Madrid have now informed Liverpool of their desire to sign Alexander-Arnold, according to talkSPORT .

arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Athletic are always a very strong team at San Mames and things won’t be easy for Real Madrid with their current lack of depth. Real Madrid visit Athletic Bilbao in what could be one of the toughest fixtures on the team’s schedule.
